positive: A mesmerizing, symmetrical composition featuring highly stylized, bioluminescent fantasy flora interwoven with intricate Art Deco geometric patterns. The central motif is a graceful, stylized celestial winged creature emerging from a curtain of glowing fern fronds and jungle vines. The color palette must be restricted to deep sapphire blues, vibrant neon turquoise, emerald green, and accents of burnished gold against a stark, deep midnight background. Use strong line art, clean silhouettes, and a high-contrast vaporwave aesthetic, perfect for screen printing onto apparel. The composition must be highly balanced and centrally placed, giving a strong, positive energy. Intricate detail, maximalist but structured, vector graphic quality.
negative: blur, low resolution, amateur, noisy, distorted, artifacts, watermark, text, illegible, extra limbs, bad anatomy, poorly drawn, cross-eyed, jpeg artifacts, signature, logo, trademark, copyrighted
